title: associative list
text: associative list A list in which each list item consists of a pair of associated values representing a key and value, or a value and its representation. In Uniface, list items are separated by a Gold separator, such as Gold-semicolon ( ; ). For example, "CA=Canada ; DE=Germany ; US=United States" . Synonyms: associated list, ValRep list, Uniface list, Gold-separated list Related Links representation The right-hand side of a ValRep list item, which defines the format used to display the value in a field. list A string comprising one or more items, in which items are separated by a subfield separator character. A list can contain the possible values for a field (known as a ValRep list). How a list is presented to users depends on the type of widget, and the properties for the field in which the list is displayed. indexed list A list in which each item is identified by an integer representing the absolute position of the item in the list.
